issues.description: Condition missing: 'If you have 2 or less Life cards' requires condition type 'TrashCount' with operator 'LessThanOrEqual' and value 2, not 'Always'
TrashFromHand action missing count parameter: should specify count:2 to trash exactly 2 cards
Extraneous effect: second trigger with PlaySelf action is not supported by card text and should be removed
